title: A Collective Evaluation Platform for LLM Code Generation
summary: This paper presents CodeArena, an online evaluation framework for LLM code generation. It introduces a collective evaluation mechanism that dynamically recalibrates individual model scores based on overall participant performance to reduce bias from benchmark leakage. The platform also provides a public repository of solutions and test cases, along with automation-friendly APIs for seamless integration into code evaluation workflows.
author: Mingzhe Du et al.
